allow: Bash(python -c "import pdfplumber; pdf = pdfplumber.open\('文件/技術文件.pdf'\); [print\(f'=== Page {i+1} ===\\n{page.extract_text\(\)}'\) for i, page in enumerate\(pdf.pages\)]; pdf.close\(\)")
Bash(python -c "import PyPDF2; f=open\('文件/技術文件.pdf','rb'\); r=PyPDF2.PdfReader\(f\); [print\(f'=== Page {i+1} ===\\n{r.pages[i].extract_text\(\)}'\) for i in range\(len\(r.pages\)\)]; f.close\(\)")
